sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁובק

Transliteration: shôbêq

Phonetic: sho-bake'

BDB Definition:

Shobek = "free"
  1. one of the heads of the people who sealed the covenant with Nehemiah

Origin: act part from a primitive root meaning to leave (compare H7662)

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
